deck: Strike x3, Defend x4, Bash+, Shockwave, Shrug It Off, Limit Break (dead — no Str source)
relics: Burning Blood, Golden Idol, Bird-Faced Urn, Incense Burner
cause_of_death: Gremlin Nob (elite F11). Entered at 43/80 (53%) with 7 Skills vs 4 Attacks. Forced to play Skills for survival on T5 (+4 Str to Nob). Died T7-T8 at 0 HP.
key_moments: Sentries at F6 drained 52 HP (60->8) with near-starter deck — only 2 monster rooms before elite.
Golden Idol Smash cost 20 HP before Sentries (80->60), compounding crisis.
Limit Break from Neow was dead weight (0 Str entire run).
Clean execution otherwise: zero hallway damage in Cultist and Slime fights, correct Bash+ upgrade, good Strike removal.
lessons: Do not path into elites with only 0-2 monster rooms beforehand — not enough fights to build a deck.
Golden Idol Smash before an elite is reckless — 20 HP loss reduces elite survivability.
Limit Break as Neow rare is dead without a Str source.
Deck Attack/Skill ratio matters for Nob — 7 Skills vs 4 Attacks makes most hands unplayable.
